target: 2. Hoine's Guide to Hitogashima Island
Hey, big sister!
Hizuru-chan, welcome back~!!
I'm five minutes late for our meeting.

Sorry, I had to go to the bathroom on my way out.
I felt like I needed to go.
But I rushed as hard as I could, right?

I see.
That was unnecessary effort.
Eh…?
It would've been fine if you'd arrived a little later.

These seemingly pointless moments are actually
precious time for a novelist to build ideas.
Hizuru-chan!
Hn… Ah, Hoine.

Hizuru-chan!
What should I say if someone tells me you're back?
…I'm home.

Hehe.
Welcome back, Hizuru-chan.
Also, Ryunosuke.

This is what you wanted.
Take it home gratefully.
Wah, wah…!?

Is this a souvenir?
You bought this for me?!

What are you talking about…?
You told me to buy it.
No, I didn't say to buy it! I just said I'd be happy if there was a souvenir.

You're right.
If you hadn't bought anything, you'd have complained.

Even though you complain like that,
it's just like you to actually buy it.

Thanks a lot.
Come on, Hoine, say thanks too.

Thank you~!
I love Hizuru-chan~!
Don't mention it, Hoine.

So, what are we doing next?
Since it's been a while since I came back,
I was going to relax at home, right?

No, I don't have time for that.
I told you, I'm back to prepare my new work
and do research.
Ah, that's why you've been so tense.
…That's not the only reason.
Huh? Did something happen?
You didn't tell anyone about me, did you?

About you…?
About 'Ryunosuke Nagumo'?
You're kidding me! I'd never tell anyone!
…I hope so.

(There's no sign of deception.
So Ryunosuke is clean… 
Where did that boy get the information from?)
Hizuru-chan~! Let's play~!
I'd love to play, but I have research to do.
Hey~! Let's play~!
Persistent, just like a child.

That's right, Hoine's still a kid who wants to play.
So, right?
You should at least listen to your cute niece's request.
I want to play with Hizuru-chan!

…I came here to work.
I didn't come back just to play with Hoine.

Just a little bit, okay?
I can spare some time.

Hoine, I know you've been waiting
for your big sister to come back.

That's right!
I was waiting!
If you want to play, play with Ryunosuke--
It's not dad! I want to play with Hizuru-chan!
Ah, heh heh…

Dah~! You know~!
Play with me, Hizuru-chan!

I'll say it again, so listen carefully.
I came to the island to work.

Yeah!
So let's play!

…Your use of 'so' is off. 
That's why kids' thinking is so frustrating.

Then, after work?
You can spare a little time, right?
Hizuru-chan, when will your work end?

I don't know either.
So give up and go home.

No way! I want to be with Hizuru-chan!
If that's the case, I can play right after your work ends!

…My work is something I do alone.
Having someone around distracts me.

What's your job, Hizuru-chan?
I'll help you!
Listen to me…

Big sister, you're going to do research, right?
Hoine, big sister has to walk around the island
after this.

Ah!
Then I'll be the island's guide!

Not needed.
I was born on this island, after all.
But, you know, the island has changed a bit.

There are places that aren't the same as when you were here,
so having a guide would be helpful, don't you think?
I can't deny that…

Hear that, Hoine!
You'll be the island's guide!
Yeah!
Hey, I didn't agree to you being the guide yet--

Come on, Hizuru-chan!
Let's go already!
Hah…
(Children are really hard. Their actions are too unpredictable.)

Ryunosuke.
You're being too lenient with Hoine.
Eh? Do I seem like that?

If you keep this up, she'll grow up thinking
that if she's stubborn, the other person will obey her.

It's okay.
Hoine isn't being stubborn, you know.
She's just being demanding because it's you.
Because it's me?

Naaa~!
Let's go already~!

(…If this continues, the most efficient thing
is to just get my goal done quickly.)

Okay.
But first, let me put my luggage in the inn.

Yay!
Then, let's go!
Hey, are you even listening?!?
